name: Search Telemetry Logs
description: Search NOVA-7 telemetry logs in Elasticsearch using flexible query parameters. Use this tool to find specific error events, filter by service, time range, severity, or any combination of telemetry fields. This is your primary investigation tool for root cause analysis.

query.description: Free-text search query to match against log message bodies. Supports Lucene query syntax.

error_type.description: Filter by error type keyword in log body (e.g., ThermalCalibrationException, GPSMultipathException). Uses body.text match.

service_name.description: Filter by originating service name (e.g., fuel-system, navigation, comms-array, sensor-validator). Maps to field: service.name

severity.description: Filter by log severity level. Maps to field: severity_text

time_range.description: Time range for the search, using Elasticsearch date math (e.g., now-5m, now-1h, now-30s). Defaults to last 15 minutes.

size.description: Maximum number of log entries to return. Default 25, max 200.

sort_order.description: Sort order by timestamp. Default descending (newest first).
